nodes.title: For local ComfyUI users
widgets_values:
[Tutorial](https://docs.comfy.org/tutorials/video/wan/wan2_2
)

## VRAM Usage

The following data was tested using an RTX 4090 24GB

| Model            | Size |VRAM Usage | 1st Generation | 2nd Generation |
|---------------------|-------|-----------|---------------|-----------------|
| fp8_scaled               |640*640| 84%               | ≈  536s              | ≈ 513s                   |
| fp8_scaled +  4steps LoRA  | 640*640  | 83%                | ≈ 97s               | ≈ 71s                   |

**Diffusion Model**
- [wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- [wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**LoRA**
- [wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/loras/wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors)
- [wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/loras/wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors)

**VAE**
- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)

**Text Encoder**   
- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)


File save location

```
ComfyUI/
├───📂 models/
│   ├───📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├─── wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   │   └─── wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   ├───📂 loras/
│   │   ├─── wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors
│   │   └─── wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors
│   ├───📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └─── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors 
│   └───📂 vae/
│       └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
```

Camera slowly zooms out while descending and tilting upward, transitioning from a close-up into a from-below low-angle mid shot, smooth continuous camera motion, stable framing, natural cinematic pacing, no jitter or abrupt cuts, consistent perspective and physically plausible lens behavior; character framed from the waist up, viewed from below, upper torso and shoulders dominant in frame, head slightly elevated relative to camera, jawline and neck subtly emphasized, facial features foreshortened naturally by the low-angle perspective, posture appearing confident and grounded, clean composition, minimal motion blur

# 📌 ComfyUI Workflow Notes

**Author:** Sharvin Suntoobacus  
**YouTube Channel:** [CodeCraftersCorner](https://www.youtube.com/@CodeCraftersCorner)  
**Patreon:** [Support on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/codecrafterscorner)  

---

## ℹ️ About This Workflow
This workflow was created and shared by **Sharvin Suntoobacus** for the community.  
Thanks for using it and supporting the work!

---

## 🎥 Tutorial / Guide
If available, you can watch the video here:  
[Watch on YouTube](PLACEHOLDER_VIDEO_LINK)

*Note: The link may take up to two days to update.*

---

## 💡 Notes
- Please credit when sharing.  
- Supporting helps me create more workflows and guides.  

---

🙏 Thank you for your support!

Transition from the from-below low-angle mid shot into a side close-up, camera smoothly repositioning laterally around the subject and pushing in, settling into a tight side-angle close-up with slightly off-axis framing, stable composition and continuous cinematic motion; focus returns to defining facial features, heterochromia clearly visible with left iris red and right iris blue, eyes in sharp focus with irises centered and unobstructed, facial proportions consistent with the previous shot, blonde hair naturally framing the face without occlusion, neutral expression, shallow depth of field isolating the eyes, physically plausible lens behavior, no distortion, no jitter, clean cinematic clarity

Natural hair-brushing gesture, character lifting one hand to gently sweep hair back from the side of her face, fingers passing through the hair smoothly, strands separating and settling naturally, subtle wrist and elbow movement with realistic timing, hair responding with soft inertia and slight secondary motion, face remaining unobstructed after the gesture, relaxed and controlled motion, stable anatomy, no exaggerated movement, bare natural nails with no nail polish, clean cinematic clarity

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Camera slowly zooms out while descending and tilting upward, transitioning from a close-up into a from-below low-angle mid shot, smooth continuous camera motion, stable framing, natural cinematic pacing, no jitter or abrupt cuts, consistent perspective and physically plausible lens behavior; character framed from the waist up, viewed from below, upper torso and shoulders dominant in frame, head slightly elevated relative to camera, jawline and neck subtly emphasized, facial features foreshortened naturally by the low-angle perspective, posture appearing confident and grounded, clean composition, minimal motion blur

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
